calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Nov-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay, Or In The Alternative, For A Protective Order That The Discovery Directed To Defendants Jia Lin Zheng, Youqiao Liu And Allen Guowai Zheng Not To Proceed
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS JIA LIN ZHENG, YOUQIAO LIU, ALLEN GUOWAI, ZHENG'S MOTION TO STAY, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER THAT THE DISCOVERY DIRECTED TO DEFENDANTS JIA LIN ZHENG, YOUQIAO LIU AND ALLEN GUOWAI ZHENG NOT TO PROCEED AT THIS TIME

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for stay is granted. The case is stayed in its entirety for all purposes until the conclusion of the criminal case against Jialin Zheng. The stay extends to served discovery, which need not be answered and may be re-served when the stay is lifted. Order submitted is under review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
